name: QuestionnaireVersion
description: Represents a version snapshot of a questionnaire in the database.

properties.name: id
properties.description: Primary key, auto-incrementing identifier for the version.

properties.name: questionnaire_id
properties.description: Foreign key reference to the parent questionnaire.

properties.name: questionnaire
properties.description: Relationship to the parent Questionnaire entity.

properties.name: version_number
properties.description: Sequential version number for the questionnaire.

properties.name: snapshot
properties.description: JSON-serialized snapshot of the questionnaire state at this version.

properties.name: created_at
properties.description: Timestamp when this version was created (UTC).

properties.name: created_by
properties.description: Identifier of the user who created this version.

properties.name: change_summary
properties.description: Human-readable summary of changes in this version.

name: TechnologyVersions
